info.description: Hero copy at the top of /practitioners. The practitioner cards themselves live in the Practitioner collection.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

kickerColour.description: Hex colour for the kicker. Default plum (#6E3A5A).

title.description: Main heading. Italic in design — written as one short sentence.

tagline.default: A small, hand-picked circle of therapists, coaches, bodyworkers, and healers I send my clients to when the work needs to go somewhere I don't.
tagline.description: Short intro paragraph under the title. 1-3 sentences.

seoTitle.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page title.

seoDescription.description: Short summary for Google + AI search engines. ~155 chars.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
